scope: Local unnotarized Apple-silicon preview; not a general OCR or legal-grade redaction claim.

bundle.staplerValidation: kLSDataUnavailableErr (ticket validation unavailable in this environment)
bundle.spctlAssessment: Code Signing subsystem internal error; no accept/reject result

verification.workerTests: 96 passed on the final source snapshot with the CPython 3.12.13 interpreter and application dependencies extracted from the exact app ZIP; pytest 8.4.2 frontend supplied separately as the test harness
verification.ocrFixtureBenchmark: 19/19 exact expected values; 2 false positives across 7 fixed synthetic fixtures using the complete browser-equivalent multi-pass union
verification.isolatedPathSmoke: PATH=/bin; bundled Vision OCR found EMAIL, PHONE, and LOCAL_PATH in the Chinese fixture; scanned PDF produced three OCR regions
verification.archiveSmoke: zip extracted, deep strict codesign verified, app launched with Bundled Python 3.12, bundled worker returned health ok, and graceful quit stopped the worker
verification.publicSafety: runtime-matching source excludes internal coordination files, caches, and build outputs; packaging disables first-party Swift debug paths, strips symbols, and removes editable-install provenance before signing

manifestSelfIdentity.reason: A file cannot contain a stable hash of its own final bytes; every distributable and companion beside it is size-and-hash identified above.
